info.name: SentinelFlow_Postman_Tests
info.description: Integration testing suite for the SentinelFlow fraud detection API. Validates single-transaction scoring profiles (including legacy 17-feature enterprise schemas), high-volume batch scoring loops, and system telemetry endpoints tracking historical fraud risk distribution.
